description: Track competitors, monitor pricing and website changes, analyze keyword and content gaps, estimate share of voice, and generate comprehensive competitive intelligence reports.
author: Paperclip

ownDomain.title: Your Domain
ownDomain.description: Your own website domain for comparison (e.g. example.com)

serpApiKeyRef.title: SERP API Key (secret ref)
serpApiKeyRef.description: Secret reference for a SERP API key used for keyword analysis

metaAdLibraryTokenRef.title: Meta Ad Library Token (secret ref)
metaAdLibraryTokenRef.description: Secret reference for Meta Ad Library access token

scanDepth.title: Website Scan Depth
scanDepth.description: Maximum number of pages to crawl per competitor site

alertOnPriceChange.title: Alert on Pricing Changes
alertOnPriceChange.description: Emit an event when a competitor changes pricing

jobs.description: Daily website and pricing scan of all tracked competitors.
Weekly competitive intelligence summary across all tracked competitors.

tools.name: competitive_add_competitor
tools.description: Add a competitor to tracking (name, domain) and perform an initial scan.

competitorId.description: ID of the competitor to remove

tools.name: competitive_list_competitors
tools.description: List all tracked competitors with their latest data summaries.

tools.name: competitive_scan_website
tools.description: Full scan of a competitor website: meta tags, headings, features, pricing page, tech stack.

competitorId.description: ID of the competitor to scan

pages.description: Specific pages to scan (paths). Defaults to homepage + /pricing + /features.

tools.name: competitive_scan_ads
tools.description: Scan Meta Ad Library for competitor ads. Returns active ad creatives and estimated spend.

tools.name: competitive_keyword_gap
tools.description: Find keywords competitors rank for that you do not, identifying ranking opportunities.

tools.name: competitive_content_gap
tools.description: Find content topics competitors cover that you do not.

tools.name: competitive_share_of_voice
tools.description: Estimate share of voice in search results for a set of target keywords.

keywords.description: Keywords to check share of voice for

tools.name: competitive_price_changes
tools.description: Get pricing change history for a competitor over time.

tools.name: competitive_full_report
tools.description: Generate a comprehensive competitive intelligence report covering all tracked competitors.
